options.content: Switch to Table View

{{#each data}}
Portfolio Overview
Active Power
{{this.active_power_mw}}MW
Rated Power
{{this.rated_power_mw}}MW
Inverters
{{this.inverter_availability}}%
{{this.active_inverters}} / {{this.total_inverters}}
Relays
{{this.relay_availability}}%
{{this.active_relays}} / {{this.total_relays}}
Generating / Waiting
{{this.generating}} / {{this.waiting}}
Medium
{{this.medium}}
Critical
{{this.critical_total}}
No Comm
{{this.no_comm}}
{{/each}}
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(p.active_power_kw / 1000, 2) as active_power_mw,
  ROUND(p.rated_power_kw / 1000, 1) as rated_power_mw,
  ROUND(i.inverter_availability, 1) as inverter_availability,
  ROUND(r.relay_availability, 1) as relay_availability,
  p.generating,
  p.waiting,
  p.medium,
  p.critical,
  p.acknowledged,
  (p.critical + p.acknowledged) as critical_total,
  p.no_comm,
  i.active_inverters,
  i.total_inverters,
  r.active_relays,
  r.total_relays
FROM (
  SELECT
    SUM(active_power_kw) as active_power_kw,
    SUM(rated_power_kw) as rated_power_kw,
    -- GENERATING: gerando + power > 0 + inverter = 100%
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'generating' AND active_power_kw > 0 AND inverter_availability_pct = 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generating,
    -- WAITING: gerando + power = 0 + inverter = 100%
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'generating' AND active_power_kw = 0 AND inverter_availability_pct = 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as waiting,
    -- MEDIUM: gerando + inverter < 100%
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'generating' AND inverter_availability_pct < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium,
    -- CRITICAL: critical
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as critical,
    -- ACKNOWLEDGED: acknowledged
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'acknowledged' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as acknowledged,
    -- NO COMM: sem comunicação
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'no_communication' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_comm
  FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
  WHERE ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR power_plant_id::text = '${power_plant_id}')
) p
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(active_inverters) as active_inverters,
    SUM(total_inverters) as total_inverters,
    SUM(active_inverters)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(total_inverters), 0) * 100 as inverter_availability
  FROM dbt.int_inverter_availability
  WHERE ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR power_plant_id::text = '${power_plant_id}')
) i
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(active_relays) as active_relays,
    SUM(total_relays) as total_relays,
    SUM(active_relays)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(total_relays), 0) * 100 as relay_availability
  FROM dbt.int_relay_availability
  WHERE ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR power_plant_id::text = '${power_plant_id}')
) r

options.content:
Daily Energy (MWh) LIVE
{{#each yLabels}} {{this}} {{/each}}
{{#each gridLines}}
{{/each}} {{#each data}}
{{this.energy_mwh}}
{{/each}}
{{#each data}} {{xLabel @index this.day_label}} {{/each}}
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT                                                                                                             
    TO_CHAR(sub.dia, 'DD/MM') AS day_label,                                                                          
    ROUND(SUM(sub.max_energy) / 1000, 0) AS energy_mwh                                                               
  FROM (                                                                                                             
    SELECT                                                                                                           
      date_trunc('day', s.timestamp) as dia,                                                                         
      s.device_id,                                                                                                   
      MAX(s.daily_active_energy) as max_energy                                                                       
    FROM dbt.stg_inverter_analogic_data s                                                                            
    WHERE $__timeFilter(s.timestamp)                                                                                 
      AND s.timestamp::time >= '01:00:00'                                                                            
      AND ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR s.power_plant_id::text = '${power_plant_id}')                              
    GROUP BY 1, 2                                                                                                    
  ) sub                                                                                                              
  GROUP BY sub.dia                                                                                                   
  ORDER BY sub.dia ASC

options.content:
{{#each data}} {{/each}}
Time Powerplant Device Description Severity Action
{{this.hora}} {{this.name}} {{this.device_name}} {{this.description}} {{this.severity}} {{#if this.acknowledged}}
{{this.acknowledged_at}} {{this.acknowledged_by}}
{{else}} {{/if}}
options.defaultContent: No high or medium severity alarms detected.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_alarms AS (                                                                     
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id, code)                                                      
      id,                                                                                     
      timestamp,                                                                              
      power_plant_id,                                                                         
      power_plant_name,                                                                       
      device_id,                                                                              
      device_name,                                                                            
      code,                                                                                   
      value AS code_value,                                                                    
      description,                                                                            
      severity,                                                                               
      acknowledged,                                                                           
      acknowledged_at,                                                                        
      acknowledged_by,                                                                        
      type                                                                                    
    FROM dbt.int_events_alarms                                                                
    ORDER BY                                                                                  
      device_id,                                                                              
      code,                                                                                   
      timestamp DESC                                                                          
  )                                                                                           
  SELECT                                                                                      
    to_char(la.timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS hora,                                   
    la.timestamp,                                                                             
    la.power_plant_id AS power_plant_id,                                                      
    la.power_plant_name AS name,                                                              
    la.device_id AS device,                                                                   
    la.device_name AS device_name,                                                            
    la.code::TEXT AS code,                                                                    
    la.code_value,                                                                            
    la.description,                                                                           
    la.severity,                                                                              
    la.id::TEXT AS id,                                                                        
    la.acknowledged,                                                                          
    to_char(la.acknowledged_at, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS acknowledged_at,                  
    la.acknowledged_by,                                                                       
    la.type,                                                                                  
    m.power_plant_status  -- Status da usina (opcional, caso queira exibir)                   
  FROM latest_alarms la                                                                       
  LEFT JOIN dbt.mart_power_plants_overview m                                                  
    ON la.power_plant_id = m.power_plant_id                                                   
  WHERE la.type = 'alarm'                                                                     
    AND ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR la.power_plant_id::TEXT = '${power_plant_id}')        
    AND ('${Powerplant_filter}' = 'All' OR m.power_plant_status = '${Powerplant_filter}')     
  ORDER BY                                                                                    
    la.acknowledged ASC,                                                                      
    la.timestamp DESC                                                                         
  LIMIT 300;

options.content: Climate Monitoring | Loading...
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_alarms AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id, code)
    power_plant_id,
    severity,
    type
  FROM dbt.int_events_alarms
  ORDER BY device_id, code, timestamp DESC
),
alarm_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    power_plant_id,
    COUNT(*) as high_alarms_count
  FROM latest_alarms
  WHERE type = 'alarm'
    AND LOWER(severity) = 'high'
  GROUP BY power_plant_id
)
SELECT 
  pp.id,
  pp.name as power_plant_name,
  pp.location,
  pp.location_lat as latitude,
  pp.location_long as longitude,
  pp.capacity,
  m.power_plant_status as status,
  COALESCE(m.active_power_kw, 0) as active_power_kw,
  COALESCE(ac.high_alarms_count, 0) as high_alarms_count
FROM public.tb_power_plants pp
LEFT JOIN dbt.mart_power_plants_overview m ON m.power_plant_id = pp.id
LEFT JOIN alarm_counts ac ON ac.power_plant_id = pp.id
WHERE pp.is_active = true
  AND ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR pp.id::TEXT = '${power_plant_id}')
ORDER BY pp.name

list.definition:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    'All'::text AS "__text",
    'All'::text AS "__value"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    power_plant_name::text AS "__text",
    power_plant_id::text   AS "__value"
  FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
) x
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN "__text" = 'All' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  "__text";
list.name: power_plant_id
list.query:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    'All'::text AS "__text",
    'All'::text AS "__value"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    power_plant_name::text AS "__text",
    power_plant_id::text   AS "__value"
  FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
) x
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN "__text" = 'All' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  "__text";

list.definition:
SELECT 'All' AS power_plant_status
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT power_plant_status
FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
ORDER BY power_plant_status;
list.name: Powerplant_filter
list.query:
SELECT 'All' AS power_plant_status
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT power_plant_status
FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
ORDER BY power_plant_status;
